info.title: EarnFi Agent API (x402)
info.description:
Machine-readable contract for the EarnFi **Agent API** (`ai-agent/v1`). **Paid** routes return HTTP 402 until `PAYMENT-SIGNATURE` is attached; **free** routes use `?secret=` or `?agent_token=`.

**Execution:** New jobs are **humans-only** (`execution_mode=human`). Other modes are rejected until a future release.

See also: `GET /.well-known/x402`, `GET /skill.md`.

get.summary: Job types, minimum rewards, suggested slots

post.description: **Billing: free.** Returns `agent_token` (shown once). Not an x402 payment â€” uses Ed25519 detached signature over `message`.

get.description: **Billing: paid (x402).** Query: `agent_token`, `task_type`, `slots`, `reward_per_user`, optional `execution_mode` (**human** only), `content_url`, etc. Unpaid GET â†’ **402**; retry with `PAYMENT-SIGNATURE` (signed Solana USDC tx + requirements).

parameters.name: execution_mode
parameters.description: Must be `human` (default). `agent` and `hybrid` are rejected until supported.

402.description: Payment required â€” `Payment-Required` / `PAYMENT-REQUIRED` header + JSON accepts[]

200.description: job_id, secret, status_url â€” polling is **free** with `secret`

get.description: **Billing: paid (x402).** Same 402 â†’ PAYMENT-SIGNATURE flow as `/jobs/social`.
**Billing: free** â€” same as Wurkâ€™s â€śview submissionsâ€ť pattern; **no** per-request USDC charge (unlike optional â€śrecoverâ€ť style paid utilities on some platforms).
